content.text:
Done. Here's a summary of the dummy changes across 3 files:

**[components/todo/useTodos.ts](components/todo/useTodos.ts)**
- Added `Priority` type (`"low" | "medium" | "high"`)
- Added `priority` field to `Todo` type
- Defaulted new todos to `"medium"` priority

**[components/todo/TodoItem.tsx](components/todo/TodoItem.tsx)**
- Added `priorityStyles` map for color-coded badges
- Rendered a priority badge next to each todo's text

**[e2e/todo.spec.ts](e2e/todo.spec.ts)**
- Added a new `"Todo App — Priority Badge"` describe block with a test verifying the badge renders
